parsed.availability_comment: Strong return indicators for 2026 after April 2025 elbow fracture; no current adverse update found.
parsed.availability_note: 2025 elbow fracture was projected to heal in 4-6 weeks, and later 2026 reporting said he would be back for IPL 2026.
parsed.followup_reason: No immediate follow-up needed; 2026 captaincy listing and post-injury return reporting materially reduce prior uncertainty.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Competes only on role/fitness, not overseas balance.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Domestic player; overseas-slot rules do not affect selection.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: CSK's listed 2026 captain; first-choice opener if fit.
